nasb.text: Some Pharisees came to Jesus, testing Him and asking, “Is it lawful for a man to divorce his wife for any reason at all?”

esv.text: And Pharisees came up to him and tested him by asking, “Is it lawful to divorce one’s wife for any cause?”

cnv.text: 法利賽人前來試探耶穌，說：“人根據某些理由休妻，可以嗎？”

ccb.text: 有几个法利赛人到耶稣那里想试探祂，便问祂：“丈夫可以用任何理由休妻吗？”

csbs.text: 有些法利赛人前来试探耶稣，说：“无论出于什么缘故，人是否可以休妻呢？”
